params.support: True for yes, false for no

delegateVote(address,uint256).notice: Delegate vote weight to another address

executeRoutedVote(uint256,bool).notice: Execute a vote with accumulated delegated weight

getDelegationGraph(address).notice: Get the full delegation graph for a voter

getEffectiveWeight(address).notice: Get the effective voting weight for an address (including delegated)
